rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GRACIE LEE SIMON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: continued to february 14, 2017. an amended petition was filed. an amended petition requires the same notice of hearing, including publication, as the petition it amends (CRC 7.53(a)). New notice and new publication are required for the continued hearing date. the notice must indicate the document is an amended petition.
